channel.title: Delicious Posts Feed - Pinterest
channel.description: Fresh posts and cooking inspiration for Pinterest discovery

item.title: Silky Mango Flan Cake with Caramel Drizzle for Tropical Dessert Lovers
item.description: This mango flan cake is a dreamy combo of creamy custard and fresh mango slices with a caramel base. Baking it in a water bath gives it that perfect silky texture. Chill it for a cool tropical treat anytime! | ⏱️ Prep: 20min | Cook: 50min | Serves: 8 | #cat1761230294638 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 50 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup granulated sugar (for caramel)
  • 4 large eggs
  • 1 (14 oz) can sweetened condensed milk
  • 1 (12 oz) can evaporated milk
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 2 ripe mangoes, peeled and thinly sliced
  • 1 cup whole milk

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #granulated #large #sweetened

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Silky Mango Flan Cake with Caramel Drizzle for Tropical Dessert Lovers
media:content.media:description: This mango flan cake is a dreamy combo of creamy custard and fresh mango slices with a caramel base. Baking it in a water bath gives it that perfect silky texture. Chill it for a cool tropical treat anytime!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Mediumpost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, granulated, large, sweetened

item.title: Fresh Spring Salad with Creamy Avocado and Zesty Citrus Dressing
item.description: This spring salad is a fresh mix of greens and creamy avocado, brightened by a lively citrus dressing. It's my go-to for a light lunch or a cool side on sunny days. Super fresh and easy to whip up! | ⏱️ Prep: 15min | Serves: 4 | #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 cups mixed spring greens, washed and dried
  • 1 ripe avocado, peeled and sliced
  • 1/2 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 small cucumber, thinly sliced
  • 1/4 cup red onion, thinly sliced
  • Juice of 1 large orange
  • Juice of 1 lime
  • 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon honey
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 tablespoon chopped fresh cilantro (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #mixed #avocado #cherry

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Spring Salad with Creamy Avocado and Zesty Citrus Dressing
media:content.media:description: This spring salad is a fresh mix of greens and creamy avocado, brightened by a lively citrus dressing. It's my go-to for a light lunch or a cool side on sunny days. Super fresh and easy to whip up!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, mixed, avocado, cherry

item.title: Hearty Spring Minestrone Soup with Fresh Veggies and Herbs
item.description: This minestrone soup is packed with fresh spring vegetables and fragrant herbs. The slow-simmered broth brings out deep, comforting flavors. It’s a perfect light dinner or cozy lunch on chilly days. | ⏱️ Prep: 20min | Cook: 50min | Serves: 6 | #cat1761230166734 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 50 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 medium onion, diced
  • 2 garlic cloves, minced
  • 2 medium carrots, diced
  • 2 celery stalks, diced
  • 1 medium zucchini, diced
  • 1 cup green beans, trimmed and cut
  • 1 cup fresh spinach, chopped
  • 1 can (14 oz) diced tomatoes with juice
  • 6 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup small pasta (like ditalini or elbow macaroni)
  • 1 can (15 oz) cannellini beans, drained and rinsed
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Fresh basil leaves, chopped, for garnish
  • Grated Parmesan cheese, for serving (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #garlic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Hearty Spring Minestrone Soup with Fresh Veggies and Herbs
media:content.media:description: This minestrone soup is packed with fresh spring vegetables and fragrant herbs. The slow-simmered broth brings out deep, comforting flavors. It’s a perfect light dinner or cozy lunch on chilly days.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Mediumpost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, olive, medium, garlic

item.title: Creamy Chicken and Mushroom Stew That Feels Like a Warm Hug
item.description: This cozy stew combines tender chicken with earthy mushrooms in a rich, creamy sauce that's perfect for chilly nights. It’s a one-pot wonder that’s both comforting and easy to whip up when you want something hearty without fuss. | ⏱️ Prep: 15min | Cook: 30min | Serves: 4 | #cat1761230383494 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 lbs boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into chunks
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 12 oz cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • 1/2 cup dry white wine or chicken broth
  • 2 cups chicken broth
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 2 tablespoons all-purpose flour
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Chicken and Mushroom Stew That Feels Like a Warm Hug
media:content.media:description: This cozy stew combines tender chicken with earthy mushrooms in a rich, creamy sauce that's perfect for chilly nights. It’s a one-pot wonder that’s both comforting and easy to whip up when you want something hearty without fuss.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Mediumpost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, olive, medium

item.title: Creamy Lemon Herb Pasta with Fresh Asparagus and Zesty Brightness
item.description: This creamy lemon herb pasta is a quick, fresh dinner that’s both light and satisfying. The fresh asparagus adds a nice crunch, and finishing with herbs really makes the flavors pop. Perfect for busy weeknights! | ⏱️ Prep: 15min | Cook: 20min | Serves: 4 | #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 12 ounces fettuccine pasta, dried
  • 1 bunch fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • Zest and juice of 1 large lemon
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh basil, chopped
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fettuccine #bunch #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Lemon Herb Pasta with Fresh Asparagus and Zesty Brightness
media:content.media:description: This creamy lemon herb pasta is a quick, fresh dinner that’s both light and satisfying. The fresh asparagus adds a nice crunch, and finishing with herbs really makes the flavors pop. Perfect for busy weeknights!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fettuccine, bunch, unsalted

item.title: Fresh Vegan Spring Roll Bowls with Creamy Peanut Sauce
item.description: These vegan spring roll bowls are packed with crunchy veggies and a creamy peanut sauce that’s just irresistible. They’re perfect for a light lunch or easy dinner when you want something fresh and satisfying. | ⏱️ Prep: 15min | Serves: 4 | #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups shredded red cabbage, raw
  • 1 large carrot, julienned
  • 1 cucumber, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup cooked rice noodles, cooled
  • 1 avocado, sliced
  • 1/4 cup fresh cilantro, chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh mint leaves, chopped
  • 1/2 cup chopped roasted peanuts
  • For the peanut sauce:
  • 1/3 cup creamy peanut butter
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup
  • 1 tablespoon lime juice
  • 1 teaspoon grated fresh ginger
  • 1 garlic clove, minced
  • Water to thin as needed

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #shredded #large #cucumber

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Vegan Spring Roll Bowls with Creamy Peanut Sauce
media:content.media:description: These vegan spring roll bowls are packed with crunchy veggies and a creamy peanut sauce that’s just irresistible. They’re perfect for a light lunch or easy dinner when you want something fresh and satisfying.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, shredded, large, cucumber

item.title: Tangy-Sweet Rhubarb and Strawberry Jam for Lazy Weekend Mornings
item.description: This rhubarb and strawberry jam is a bright, fresh twist on classic preserves. The perfect balance of tart and sweet makes it ideal for toast or yogurt on relaxed weekend mornings. I love how the rhubarb adds a subtle zing! | ⏱️ Prep: 20min | Cook: 45min | Serves: 6 | #cat1761230294638 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 45 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 cups fresh strawberries, hulled and halved
  • 3 cups chopped rhubarb stalks
  • 4 cups granulated sugar
  • 1/4 cup fresh lemon juice
  • 1 packet fruit pectin (about 1.75 oz)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #chopped #granulated

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Tangy-Sweet Rhubarb and Strawberry Jam for Lazy Weekend Mornings
media:content.media:description: This rhubarb and strawberry jam is a bright, fresh twist on classic preserves. The perfect balance of tart and sweet makes it ideal for toast or yogurt on relaxed weekend mornings. I love how the rhubarb adds a subtle zing!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Mediumpost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, chopped, granulated
